faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Cortlandt, NY?
faqs.answer: Cortlandt residents commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows. The area's proximity to wooded regions and the Hudson River attracts various species seeking shelter indoors, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Cortlandt and surrounding Westchester areas. Our team understands that spider infestations can be unsettling, so we prioritize rapid response times to restore your peace of mind quickly.

faqs.question: Are your spider control treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians take extra precautions in homes with families and will explain all safety measures during your service appointment.
